General.Name: NewcelX Ltd.
General.Description: NewcelX Ltd., a biotechnology company, engages in developing transformative cell-based and small-molecule therapies for neurodegenerative and metabolic diseases. The company was founded in 2008 and is headquartered in Zurich, Switzerland.

1.Name: Prof. Michel  Revel M.D., Ph.D.
1.Title: Co-Founder, Chief Scientist, Head of the Scientific Advisory Board & Director
